name: io.github.maxim-mazurok/teams-api
title: Microsoft Teams API
description: AI-native Microsoft Teams integration — read conversations, send messages, search people and chats via the Teams Chat Service REST API

environmentVariables.name: TEAMS_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Corporate email address for Teams authentication

environmentVariables.name: TEAMS_AUTO
environmentVariables.description: Set to "true" to use auto-login (macOS + FIDO2)

environmentVariables.name: TEAMS_LOGIN
environmentVariables.description: Set to "true" to use interactive browser login (all platforms)

environmentVariables.name: TEAMS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Pre-existing Skype token for direct authentication

environmentVariables.name: TEAMS_REGION
environmentVariables.description: API region (required with TEAMS_TOKEN, auto-detected otherwise)

environmentVariables.name: TEAMS_BEARER_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Middle-tier bearer token for profile resolution

environmentVariables.name: TEAMS_SUBSTRATE_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Substrate bearer token for people/chat search
